question: The scatter plot shows daily screen time vs. hours of sleep. Which statement is most accurate according to the chart data?

options.A: There is no clear overall relationship between daily screen time and hours of sleep.
options.B: People who spend more time on screens tend to get more sleep.
options.C: People who spend more time on screens tend to get less sleep.
options.D: All individuals get roughly the same amount of sleep regardless of screen time.

explanation: This scatter plot uses dual encoding: point position shows the relationship, but point size and color also encode the x-variable, making high values overly salient. That can tempt viewers to overstate the strength or form of the relationship.
